allow: Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'echo "node: $\(node -v 2>/dev/null || echo no\)"; echo "npm: $\(npm -v 2>/dev/null || echo no\)"; echo "ng: $\(ng version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo no\)"')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'tail -4 /tmp/omni_install.log 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/frontend/node_modules >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "node_modules present" || echo "no node_modules yet"')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'tail -5 /tmp/omni_install.log 2>/dev/null; echo "---exit marker---"; grep -c "added" /tmp/omni_install.log 2>/dev/null; ls /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/frontend/node_modules/.bin/ng >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "ng available" || echo "ng not yet"')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'tail -6 /tmp/omni_install.log 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/frontend/node_modules/.bin/ng >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "ng available" || echo "ng not yet"')

Bash(wsl.exe -e bash -lc 'test -x /home/ema/personal-repos/omni-red/frontend/node_modules/.bin/ng && echo "DEPS_OK" || echo "DEPS_PENDIENTE"; echo "--- build ---"; tail -6 /tmp/omni_build.log 2>/dev/null || echo "\(build aún no inicia\)"')
